_readme: video: 클립 파일명. start/end는 클립 기준 초. ★가 핵심 표현.
title: EP.05 — for the best

sentences.en: You seem upbeat this morning. Did you have fun with Blair last night?
sentences.ko: 오늘 아침 기분 좋아 보이네. 어젯밤 블레어랑 즐거웠어?

sentences.en: Actually, we got into a pretty big fight.
You want my advice? Apologize, even if it was her fault.
sentences.ko: 내 조언 듣고 싶어? 사과해, 그게 그녀 잘못이었더라도.

sentences.en: Flowers, maybe some jewelry if she's really upset.
★ I don't know. I think it might be for the best.
